data.name: Come on in! Succubus-san ~I'll Have Your Semen Tonight, too♪ Hungry Mere Squeezes Out Your Semen~
data.detailed_description:
Up-close and Personal Succubus Cum Milking... Powered by Live2D x ASMR!

The sensual succubus is voiced by Narumi Aisaka, her dulcet tones recorded on a fully binaural dummy head mic for your aural pleasure. Combined with the sexy yet cute illustration by Takebi, you get an intensely intimate cum-squeezing experience just for you...

A light yet rich ball-draining experience brought to life with silky-smooth Live2D and fully binaural audio.

~Overview~

Enjoy sensual cum-squeezing sex with the succubus through simple controls like proceed, go back, and repeat!
Experience three distinct ways to play: the "Virgin Chapter," where your semen is squeezed out as food for the succubus; the "Counterattack Chapter," where you teach the succubus a lesson and make her submit; and "Free Mode," where you can enjoy your favorite situations.

~Get even closer~

In this game, the closer you get to her, the closer her voice will sound.
How's that for realism?

~She'll suck the sperm right out of your balls~

The cross-section view during sex will show you her vagina slurping on your cock as she drains you dry.
Watch her insides undulate as they envelope your cock...

Extensive Options

  • Outfit Selection: Succubus Outfit, Nude

  • Lewd crest - ON or OFF

  • Pubic hair - ON or OFF

  • Lights - ON or OFF

  • Cross-section views - ON or OFF

  • Heart Eyes (Free Mode Only)

  • POV sex frame

  • Sweat (Free Mode Only)

*This game has a short playtime.
